properties.description: Detects PowerShell commands that download and execute files or scripts
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Message|contains has "DownloadString" or Message|contains has "DownloadFile" or Message|contains has "Invoke-WebRequest" or Message|contains has "iwr" or Message|contains has "wget" or Message|contains has "curl" or Message|contains has "WebClient" or Message|contains has "Net.WebClient" or Message|contains has "Start-BitsTransfer") and (Message|contains has "Invoke-Expression" or Message|contains has "iex" or Message|contains has "Invoke-Command" or Message|contains has "icm" or Message|contains has "Start-Process" or Message|contains has "saps" or Message|contains has "&" or Message|contains has "cmd /c" or Message|contains has "powershell -c") and (Message|contains has "FromBase64String" or Message|contains has "EncodedCommand" or Message|contains has "Reflection.Assembly" or Message|contains has "Load" or Message|contains has "GetType" or Message|contains has "GetMethod" or Message|contains has "Invoke") and (Message|contains has "raw.githubusercontent" or Message|contains has "pastebin.com" or Message|contains has "hastebin" or Message|contains has "ghostbin" or Message|contains has "bit.ly" or Message|contains has "tinyurl" or Message|contains has ".tk" or Message|contains has ".ml" or Message|contains has ".ga" or Message|contains has ".cf")
